title: Slovakian Pierogi with Rimaninata Filling
description: Slovakian pierogi filled with a delicious rimacinata filling, perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Combine semolina, flour, and eggs in a large mixing bowl to make the pierogi dough.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll out each piece into a thin sheet.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of rimacinata filling in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the pierogi.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pierogi for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Serve the pierogi hot with your favorite toppings, such as sour cream or fried onions.
